description: Response shape for GET /v1/proposals/{id} and GET /v1/proposals. Exposes the Proposal.to_dict() surface over the API. Status field is governed by the proposal_status enum. Crosses the API boundary (ADR-056 D7 criterion 6). Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 (#366). Source: src/api/v1/schemas.py, class ProposalResponse.

proposal_id.description: Unique proposal identifier (text, not UUID — matches autonomous_proposals.proposal_id).

goal.description: Natural language description of what the proposal intends to accomplish.

scope.description: ProposalScope JSONB — files and other resource constraints. Conforms to ProposalScope.json.

risk.description: RiskAssessment JSONB (contracts.risk_assessment). Null before constitutional validation.

status.description: Proposal lifecycle state. Governed by proposal_status enum.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the proposal was created.

created_by.description: Username or agent identifier that created the proposal. 'autonomous' for daemon-originated proposals.

validation_checks.description: Constitutional validation check results. Null before validation runs. Shape is implementation-specific.

validation_results.description: Detailed validation results after constitutional checks. Null before validation.

execution_started_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when proposal execution began.

execution_completed_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when proposal execution completed.

execution_results.description: Per-action execution results. Null before execution. Shape is action-type-specific.

constitutional_constraints.description: Constitutional constraints applied to this proposal. Null before validation.

approval_required.description: Whether human approval is required before execution. True for CRITICAL or ELEVATED risk proposals.

approved_by.description: Username that granted approval. Null until approved.

approved_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when approval was granted.

approval_authority.description: The governance authority level that approved this proposal (e.g. 'governor', 'autonomous').

failure_reason.description: Human-readable failure explanation when status=failed|rejected. Null on success.
